# Raj Kumar Sunar - Data Analyst Portfolio

## About
Raj Kumar Sunar is a Data Analyst based in West Sussex, UK, specializing in converting complex data into actionable business insights.
Expertise: Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Machine Learning, and Django.

## Key Links
- Home: https://rajsunar.live/
- Projects: https://rajsunar.live/projects/
- Articles: https://rajsunar.live/articles/
- Case Studies: https://rajsunar.live/case-studies/
- Resume/CV: https://rajsunar.live/cv/

## Projects
- **Loan Data Automation**: Automated loan processing system increasing efficiency by 50%.
- **Customer Satisfaction Prediction**: ML model using ANN and Decision Trees.
- **Product Sales Analysis**: Strategic dashboard for sales optimization.
